chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ زَادَ عَلَى خَمْسِ تَكْبِيرَاتٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The one who exceeds upon the five Takbeers

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/65)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/65)
text: كَبَّرَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) عَلَى سَهْلِ بْنِ حُنَيْفٍ وَ كَانَ بَدْرِيّاً خَمْسَ تَكْبِيرَاتٍ ثُمَّ مَشَى سَاعَةً ثُمَّ وَضَعَهُ وَ كَبَّرَ عَلَيْهِ خَمْسَةً أُخْرَى فَصَنَعَ ذَلِكَ حَتَّى كَبَّرَ عَلَيْهِ خَمْساً وَ عِشْرِينَ تَكْبِيرَةً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Amir Al Momineenasws exclaimed five Takbeers upon Sahl Bin Huneyf, and he was a Badariyya (a participant in the battle of Badr). Then heasws walked a while, then placed him (his body) and exclaimed another five Takbeers upon him. So heasws kept on doing that until heasws had exclaimed twenty five Takbeers upon him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Um ay r from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, in Salah (prayer) for Sahl ibn Hunayf who was a Badriy, (participant in the battle of Badr) said five Takbir. He (the Imam then walked for a while, then placed him on the ground and said another five Takbir and so on until he had said twenty- five Takbir.’”
